verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let the redeemed of the Lord say so Let the redeemed of the Lord say so Let the redeemed of the Lord say so I'm redeemed, I'm redeemed praise the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Ah Lord God, Thou hast made the heavens And the earth by Thy great power Ah Lord God, Thou hast made the heavens And the earth by Thy outstretched arms

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Nothing is impossible for Thee Nothing is impossible for Thee Great and mighty God Great in power mighty is He Nothing, nothing, Absolutely nothing Nothing is impossible for Thee
